"'''The New Jedi Order in 100 Easy Lessons'''" is a 10-page reference article appearing in [[Star Wars Insider 74|''Star Wars Insider'' 74]]. It was written by [[Jason Fry]], illustrations by [[Michael Sutfin|Mike Sutfin]].

The article contains a full list of the [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''New Jedi Order'']] novels, tie-in comics and short stories, with '''Characters Introduced''' and '''Key Events''' explaining specific details along the series. In addition, the article provides many useful summaries and behind the scenes information.
